scripts.pack:canonical: node vendor/xananode-core/bin/xananode.js build-pack exampleSite --out exampleSite/packs/xananode-canonical --id xananode.canonical --name "XanaNode Canonical Pack" --namespace xananode.example --repository-url https://github.com/kingc95/xananode
scripts.example:dev: npm run prepare && hugo server --source exampleSite --themesDir ../..
